Container.Name: Plex Poster Helper 2
Container.Overview: Browse your Plex library and apply MediUX / ThePosterDB poster sets - follow creators, schedule weekly syncs, and reset posters. The full desktop GUI, accessible from your browser via KasmVNC.
Container.Description: Browse your Plex library and apply MediUX / ThePosterDB poster sets. Full GUI in your browser.

Config.Name: WebUI HTTP
Config.Description: Plain HTTP port. Clipboard paste will not work on HTTP - use the HTTPS port instead.

Config.Name: WebUI HTTPS
Config.Description: HTTPS port (self-signed cert). Use https://[IP]:3940 in your browser for clipboard paste support. Accept the certificate warning once.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Config, schedules, applied-poster history, and installed Chromium.
